problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
